ServerFirewall.description: Firewalls which should be applied on the Server's public network interface at creation time.

enableIpv4.description: Attach an IPv4 on the public NIC. If false, no IPv4 address will be attached.

enableIpv6.description: Attach an IPv6 on the public NIC. If false, no IPv6 address will be attached.

ipv4.description: ID of the ipv4 Primary IP to use. If omitted and enable_ipv4 is true, a new ipv4 Primary IP will automatically be created.

ipv6.description: ID of the ipv6 Primary IP to use. If omitted and enable_ipv6 is true, a new ipv6 Primary IP will automatically be created.

name.description: Name of the Server to create (must be unique per Project and a valid hostname as per RFC 1123).

location.description: ID or name of the Location to create the Server in (must not be used together with `datacenter`).

datacenter.description: **Deprecated**: This property is deprecated and will be removed after the 1 July 2026.

serverType.description: ID or name of the Server type this Server should be created with.

startAfterCreate.description: This automatically triggers a Power on a Server-Server Action after the creation is finished and is returned in the `next_actions` response object.

image.description: ID or name of the Image the Server is created from.

placementGroup.description: ID of the Placement Group the Server should be in.

sshKeys.description: SSH key IDs (`integer`) or names (`string`) which should be injected into the Server at creation time.

volumes.description: Volume IDs which should be attached to the Server at the creation time. Volumes must be in the same Location.

networks.description: Network IDs which should be attached to the Server private network interface at the creation time.

firewalls.description: Firewalls which should be applied on the Server's public network interface at creation time.

userData.description: Cloud-Init user data to use during Server creation. This field is limited to 32KiB.
